text.message: Hey Black, I would like to apologize for my play last game lol
No apologies needed, I'd say you had a very good chance to win, block at the end was an unfortunate error but that's ok!
It was bot placement, I panicked ha
Yes so wasn't really your fault, sometimes that clock goes quickly, and the game has been glitchy lately
Very likely that red would have won anyways
I did pull the second mono though but would have needed to take army as well so I had like <1% to win haha
6 9 3 in fourth, wow what a board
I thought orange might go 8 3 and end your whole career red haha but 8 4 3 is better
Yeah it was a gamble for sure
But that's what I need too
But it slows down both u isnt that point of robber
Right I'm sayin that orange has done stuff
It wasnt meant for u sorry it blocked ya
Could be argued the 8 is better block because I think red is way ahead
doesnt black road settle for the win
If I dont get road it is not me
I think my window has closed
I don't have two vps by there
If I had a mono I don't think I'd use it for that
Could be putting you on 9 right?
Oof isnt black just on 9 here
